ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "target_field" TEXT /* Target field for the transaction (e.g., transaction_date, transaction_invoice) */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the transaction */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the transaction */,
  "net" TEXT /* Net amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  "decimal_place" INTEGER /* Decimal place used in the transaction */,
  "grouping" TEXT /* Grouping format used in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., check, invoice) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_target_field FOREIGN KEY ("target_field") REFERENCES targets ("target_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., issued, paid, overdue) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate against a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of the format (e.g., date, number) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., transaction_date, transaction_invoice) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_invoices" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "invoice_id")
)
